# ORDO

> A measured, honest context-engineering framework for LLMs: a terse command grammar + an output-
> discipline contract + quality/autonomy gates. Runtime (decode/format/inbound) + a paste-in spec.
> No magic claims; an honest scorecard ships with it (GPT-tokenizer proxies; re-validate on your model).

## Start here
- [OPERATING-PROFILE.md](OPERATING-PROFILE.md): the whole framework on one page (paste into a system prompt).
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how an AI agent activates and uses ORDO.
- [README.md](README.md): install, the honest scorecard, runtime-vs-methodology.
- [ORDO.md](ORDO.md): the language skillstone (teach an LLM ORDO-G in one paste).

## Runtime (executable)
- src/index.js: decode(), emit()/bestFormat(), compressInbound() (measured-revert), ponytailFlags(), resolveModel(), classifyTask(), getSpec().
- tools/measure.mjs: real cost/token/duration meter from Claude Code's own JSONL usage.* (lossless billed counts).
- tools/clock.mjs: wall-clock latency harness (the path to EARN "faster"; cut until clock-ab.json records a paired win).
- `npm install ordo-llm` ; `npx ordo measure` ; `npx ordo init` ; `npm test` (24/24).
- Install for non-coders: `/plugin marketplace add SprucetheAI/ordo` → `/plugin install`, or `npx ordo init`.

## Methodology (prompt SOPs — text, not code)
- spec/thinking.md (the single-pass dispatcher: classify LIGHT/STRICT → route effort; diction, verify-assert, goal-lock, reuse-replan, divergence-width, self-heal).
- spec/framework.md (REFEED loop + self-heal failure-branch), spec/experimentalist-gate.md, spec/evaluation-gate.md,
  spec/autonomy.md, spec/context-rot.md, spec/orchestration.md.
- spec/code-context.md (code-graph contract: AST-first, budgeted render, confidence-tagged edges).
- spec/decompose.md (task-graph data contract: lower-id DAG + per-node testStrategy).

## Evidence
- BENCHMARKS.md (computed vs agent-judged, with reproduce commands).
- VERDICT.md (every measured number + the cut list).
- docs/SELF-EVAL.md (ORDO scored 6.5/10 by its own evaluation gate — the honest critique).
- DISCLAIMERS.md (private-use ethics; not for evading safety/monitoring).
